make.sentence: These small actions make a spring day in Kyoto easy and pleasant.

pleasant.contextMeaning: The spring day feels nice and enjoyable
pleasant.sentence: These small actions make a spring day in Kyoto easy and pleasant.

news.simpleMeaning: New things people hear or read
news.contextMeaning: Short simple reports about real things that happened
news.sentence: If you want more simple news stories, visit ovi english dot com.

stories.contextMeaning: Short news reports about real things that happened
stories.sentence: If you want more simple news stories, visit ovi english dot com.

thanks.simpleMeaning: A kind way to say you are happy
thanks.contextMeaning: A kind way to show you are happy they listened
thanks.sentence: Thanks for listening, and see you next time.

listening.simpleMeaning: Using your ears to hear someone
listening.sentence: Thanks for listening, and see you next time.

opening.contextMeaning: The first part of the program

story.simpleMeaning: A thing that tells about people or events
story.contextMeaning: A report about Mina arriving in Kyoto
story.sentence: [NEWS STORY] Mina arrived in Kyoto on a soft, sunny morning.

practice.simpleMeaning: Do something again to get better
practice.contextMeaning: This is a test question for learning, not the real story
practice.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: Where was Mina in this story?

where.contextMeaning: It asks about the place Mina was in
where.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: Where was Mina in this story?

say.simpleMeaning: Use your mouth to tell words
say.contextMeaning: The volunteer told the start time
say.sentence: QUESTION: What time did the volunteer say the festival started?

buy.contextMeaning: Mina got a snack by paying money
buy.sentence: QUESTION: What snack did Mina buy?

throw.simpleMeaning: Move something fast with your hand
throw.contextMeaning: Mina put her trash in the bin
throw.sentence: QUESTION: Why did Mina throw her trash away?

closing.simpleMeaning: The last part at the end
closing.contextMeaning: This is the last question or ending part
closing.sentence: [CLOSING] So, what should a visitor do first in a crowded city park?
